## Biome exclusive actions
## Actions from other sources
:::note
Some **Biome** rules might **not** have options, compared to the original rule.
:::
### @eslint/json
| @eslint/json Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-keys](https://github.com/eslint/json/blob/main/docs/rules/sort-keys.md) |[useSortedKeys](/assist/actions/use-sorted-keys) |
### Sherif
| Sherif Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [unordered-dependencies](https://github.com/QuiiBz/sherif#unordered-dependencies) |[useSortedPackageJson](/assist/actions/use-sorted-package-json) (inspired) |
### eslint-plugin-package-json
| eslint-plugin-package-json Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-collections](https://github.com/JoshuaKGoldberg/eslint-plugin-package-json/blob/main/docs/rules/sort-collections.md) |[useSortedPackageJson](/assist/actions/use-sorted-package-json) (inspired) |

| eslint-plugin-package-json-dependencies Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [alphabetically-sorted-dependencies](https://github.com/idan-at/eslint-plugin-package-json-dependencies/blob/master/docs/rules/alphabetically-sorted-dependencies.md) |[useSortedPackageJson](/assist/actions/use-sorted-package-json) (inspired) |
### sort-package-json
| sort-package-json Actions name | Biome Actions name |
| ---- | ---- |
| [sort-package-json](https://github.com/keithamus/sort-package-json) |[useSortedPackageJson](/assist/actions/use-sorted-package-json) |

Help us by [contributing](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) to the [analyzer](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/blob/main/crates/biome_analyze/CONTRIBUTING.md) or create a rule suggestion [here](https://github.com/biomejs/biome/discussions/categories/rule-suggestion).
